## About me

Computer Engineering student specializing in **AI/ML**, with hands-on experience building intelligent systems intended for real use. I am **2× national hackathon 2nd runner-up**, have shipped AI products under tight deadlines—from autonomous hiring workflows to multi-agent document formatters—and am a **published researcher** in *International Journal of Research and Innovation in Social Science (IJRISS)*. I care about applying modern AI and machine learning to practical problems **at scale**.

---

## Education

**B.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning** — Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology, Ahmedabad, Gujarat (2023 – present).

---

## Highlights

- **CodeVersity National Hackathon (IIT Gandhinagar, 48h)** — 2nd runner-up · team _Apex_ · HireMinds AI (autonomous hiring orchestrator).
- **GDG Autonomous Hackathon 2026** — 2nd runner-up · StartupOps (AI co-founder-style advisory).
- **HACKaMINeD 2026 (Nirma University)** — Magnetic Manuscript: multi-agent LangGraph pipeline toward major journal-ready formatting.
- **Avishkar 2.0 (2025)** — Food Insight Scanner: Flutter + Groq AI + OCR for labels and personalised nutrition scoring.
- **Smart India Hackathon** — cleared internal college qualifier (2025).
- **Research** — ICEM/IJRISS (2026) · DOI [10.47772/IJRISS.2026.10190029](https://doi.org/10.47772/IJRISS.2026.10190029).

---

## Toolkit

<div align="center">

[![Skill icons](https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=py,java,ts,js,dart,react,nextjs,tailwind,nodejs,firebase,flutter,docker,git,mongodb,postgres,gcp,aws)](https://skillicons.dev)

</div>

**Languages:** Python, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Dart  

**AI/ML:** LangGraph, LangChain, Groq, TensorFlow, OCR (Google ML Kit), multi-agent systems  

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Flutter  

**Backend:** Node.js, FastAPI, REST APIs, Firebase  

**Platforms & tooling:** Docker, Git, Linux, AWS, Google Cloud  

**Data:** Firebase Firestore, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
